Class BotLiveServiceGrpc

java.lang.Object
com.soulfiremc.grpc.generated.BotLiveServiceGrpc
public final class BotLiveServiceGrpc extends Object
Live bot automation service. See file header for scope and design notes.
Permissions:
- READ_BOT_INFO: required for WatchBotEvents, GetBlock, FindBlocks,
                 ListNearbyEntities.
- UPDATE_BOT_CONFIG: required for SendChat, DigBlock, PlaceBlock, UseItem,
                     AttackEntity, InteractEntity, SwingArm, GoTo,
                     StopPathfinding.
Error handling mirrors BotService:
- NOT_FOUND: instance or bot does not exist.
- FAILED_PRECONDITION: bot is not online, target not loaded, or the
                       requested action is not currently valid.
- OUT_OF_RANGE: target is outside the bot's reach / observation radius.
- INTERNAL: unexpected server errors.

    Class

    static interface 
    BotLiveServiceGrpc.AsyncService
    Live bot automation service.
    static final class 
    BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceBlockingStub
    A stub to allow clients to do limited synchronous rpc calls to service BotLiveService.
    static final class 
    BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceBlockingV2Stub
    A stub to allow clients to do synchronous rpc calls to service BotLiveService.
    static final class 
    BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceFutureStub
    A stub to allow clients to do ListenableFuture-style rpc calls to service BotLiveService.
    static class 
    BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceImplBase
    Base class for the server implementation of the service BotLiveService.
    static final class 
    BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceStub
    A stub to allow clients to do asynchronous rpc calls to service BotLiveService.

    static BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceBlockingStub
    newBlockingStub(io.grpc.Channel channel)
    Creates a new blocking-style stub that supports unary and streaming output calls on the service
